name: Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Frozen Mixed Vegetables (beans, peas, carrots, corn, and limas)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large covered pot, combine water, bouillon cubes, salt, and pepper.
2. Add celery, onion, diced tomatoes, frozen okra, frozen mixed vegetables, pinto beans, potato, green pepper, mushrooms, tomato juice, and cayenne pepper.
3. Cook together for 5-6 hours until all ingredients are tender.
4. Allow to cool before serving. Excellent reheated. Store in freezer containers for up to one family sitting.
